subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath raised up this heaven without pillars, and spread forth the earth upon the waters, and subjected the winds and caused them to flow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الذی رفع هذا السماء بغیر عمد و دحی الارض علی الما و سخر الاریاح و صرف
subcodes.subjects: @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @proclamation to people of the Bayan
